label: Trust Service Providers — 24-Hour Incident Reporting Instead of 72-Hour
description: Trust service providers must notify significant incidents within 24 hours (not the standard 72 hours). This is a stricter requirement, not a relaxation — it modifies the incident notification deadline.
human_review_note: Art 23(4) provides that trust service providers must submit the notification under (b) within 24 hours. This replaces the 72h deadline only for trust service providers.

label: National Security / Defence / Law Enforcement Exclusion
description: Public administration entities carrying out activities in the areas of national security, public security, defence or law enforcement are excluded from the scope of this Directive.

label: DORA Exclusion — Financial Entities Covered by Regulation (EU) 2022/2554
description: Entities that are excluded from the scope of Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 (DORA) under Article 2(4) of that Regulation are also excluded from NIS2.

label: Proportionate Application for Small and Micro Enterprises
description: This Directive does not apply to entities qualifying as small or micro enterprises (fewer than 50 employees and annual turnover or balance sheet total not exceeding €10M), except where they fall under one of the special categories in Article 2(2).
